goal: Pivot from failed full-surface directional prediction to base-conditional trade-quality overlays — entry veto, early-cut, and hold-extension — that improve the immutable base without retuning its logic.
global_constraints: Base snapshot active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify its signals, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic
No full-surface directional classification or regression on future PnL (v4–v7 routes terminally closed)
All v8 work operates on trade-level surface of already-executed base trades, not on all anchor bars
Feature selection, label selection, and threshold selection only on selection OOS — never on lockbox
Overlay labels must be frozen before any model training begins
Do not mix entry-veto and exit-extension objectives in a single label
Purge gap between train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows must be ≥ max holding horizon (minimum 24h)
Every improvement claim requires matched lockbox OOS comparison against immutable base on same trade window with same notionals

slices.title: Ownership, cannibalization analysis, and final overlay verdict
slices.hypothesis: Compute ownership and cannibalization for every surviving overlay route, render a final honest verdict (success / partial / failed), and close v8 with a complete report.
slices.objective: Compute ownership and cannibalization for every surviving overlay route, render a final honest verdict (success / partial / failed), and close v8 with a complete report.
success_criteria: Ownership analysis completed for every surviving overlay
Cannibalization risk assessed — no overlay worsens net outcome
Final verdict rendered with clear decision per route
v8 closure report written with all result fields populated
Next direction documented based on outcome
evidence_requirements: Ownership analysis completed for every surviving overlay
Cannibalization risk assessed — no overlay worsens net outcome
Final verdict rendered with clear decision per route
v8 closure report written with all result fields populated
